violations.text: Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (berries) in the reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025

Protein Balls packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. PIC moved protein balls to refrigeration behind the counter. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2024
Ice scoop in ice machine was observed with handle in the ice. PIC informed, handle was placed with handle upright. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2024

The door to the outside, located at the front of establishment, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/15/2024

Utensils in the utensil urn were displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. PIC inverted utensils at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/01/2024
Boxes of single service items are being stored on the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 03/01/2024
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 03/15/2024
The receptacle in the toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 03/15/2024

The coving and wall juncture in the dining area is in poor repair. Inspector observed a hole in the floor and section of coving missing. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/15/2024
